title: Internship E2E — college view, student apply, employer select
oneLiner: After a GT-* internship is published: college approves for campus, student applies, employer shortlists and selects.

steps.label: Log in as college admin
steps.observe: College hub loads. You are verifying the employer's published internship is visible to campus.

steps.label: Open college Internships list
steps.observe: Partner listings appear as Pending review until you approve them for campus.

steps.label: Search for the guided internship by marker
steps.observe: Table filters to {{marker}} in the title column.

steps.label: Filter campus status to Pending review
steps.observe: Only listings awaiting college approval remain visible.

steps.label: Approve guided internship for campus
steps.observe: Row with {{marker}} — click Approve (skipped if already Approved from a prior run).

steps.label: Confirm campus status is Approved
steps.observe: Filter Campus status → Approved; {{marker}} row shows Approved badge. College handoff to Student.

steps.label: Open college Applications (monitor pipeline)
steps.observe: Campus-wide application list. Student rows may appear after the student applies in the next phase.

steps.label: Log in as student (Arjun Verma)
steps.observe: Student dashboard loads. Student must have a primary CV on profile to apply.

steps.label: Open Browse Internships
steps.observe: List of internships visible to IIT Madras. Guided posting should appear if publish step included your campus.

steps.label: Search for the guided internship by marker
steps.observe: Table filters to rows matching the GT- session marker in the role/title column.

steps.label: Click Apply on the guided internship row
steps.observe: Success toast; status badge changes from Open to Applied (or similar). If blocked, check CV on student profile.

steps.label: Confirm application status on list
steps.observe: Same row shows Applied (not Open). Note student name for employer step.

steps.label: Log in as employer
steps.observe: Employer hub loads.

steps.label: Open Applications — Internships tab
steps.observe: Internships tab selected; table shows program applications (not placement drives).

steps.label: Search applicants by guided internship marker
steps.observe: Filters to Arjun Verma (or the student who applied) for the GT- internship opening.

action.placeholder: Search by name, email, college, or opening

steps.label: Shortlist the applicant
steps.observe: Status changes from Applied to Shortlisted; Shortlist button disappears.

steps.label: Select the shortlisted candidate
steps.observe: Status becomes Selected. Select / Reject buttons appear only when shortlisted.

steps.label: Filter list to Selected and confirm
steps.observe: Applicant row shows Selected badge. Pipeline step complete.

steps.label: Log in as student — view application status
steps.observe: Student sees updated status (Selected) on My Applications → Internships.

steps.label: Open My Applications — Internships
steps.observe: Application for the GT- internship shows Selected (or latest employer status).
